name: docs-test-script-cleanup

description: Inventory repo docs and test scripts, identify outdated or unneeded items, and remove/archive only after explicit scope confirmation.
scope: Aggressive cleanup of outdated docs, historical artifacts, local tools, and non-formal test/visual-check scripts; preserve core docs, Trellis workflow/specs/tasks, and formal test suites.

notes: User selected aggressive cleanup option 3. Verification passed: core markdown link check, frontend package script reference check, npm --prefix .\frontend test.
